title: OpenAI Presence packages controls for enterprise voice and chat agents
friendlyTitle: OpenAI launches a managed platform for business AI agents
summary: OpenAI has introduced Presence, a platform for deploying customer-facing and internal agents across voice and chat. It brings company context, policies, permissions, guardrails, actions and evaluations into a shared operating layer, with support from forward-deployed engineers for larger implementations.
friendlySummary: Presence helps companies build voice and chat agents with rules, permissions, safety checks and testing in one place.
whyItMatters: Businesses buying agents increasingly need lifecycle controls and human escalation, not only a capable model. Presence may reduce custom integration work, but teams should still test reliability, data handling, lock-in and the cost of a services-heavy deployment.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may make business agents easier to control, but companies still need to test them carefully and understand their costs and data use.
